why_them: Independent family butcher with town centre retail and online shop. Site is functional-only with no brand story or local provenance SEO. Strong locally-sourced identity to develop.
notes: Retail: 25 English Street, Dumfries DG1 2DA. Phone: 01387 270689. Wholesale depot: Lochside Industrial Estate, DG2 0JE. Email: sales@gallowayfoodservice.co.uk. Facebook @GallowayQualityMeats. Online shop active.

why_them: Events and wedding caterer at Crichton Golf Club with 18+ years experience. Basic template website with no clear visual identity. Serves weddings, festivals, hog roasts, private dining across D&G.
notes: Based at Crichton Golf Club, Bankend Road area, Dumfries DG1. Owner/chef: Craig Patterson (18+ years). Active on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn. DG Food and Drink listed.

why_them: Premier event catering company at Kingholm Quay rated 4.8/5 on ThreeBestRated. Existing website is dated. Professional redesign with enquiry workflow would drive event bookings.
notes: Unit 4, Kingholm Quay, Dumfries DG1 4SU. Phone: 01387 264888. Email: enquiries@hullabalootoyou.co.uk. Mon-Wed 9am-5pm, Thu-Fri 10am-7pm. Facebook @hullabalootoyou. Note: different business from Hullabaloo Restaurant already in DB.

why_them: Florist specialising in wedding and event flowers on St Mary Street. Has a website. A portfolio-led refresh showcasing real D&G weddings with strong SEO for 'wedding flowers Dumfries and Galloway' would drive enquiries from couples across the region.

Family florist on St Cuthbert Street. Has a website. Adding a dedicated wedding gallery with real ceremony photos and improving SEO for 'wedding florist Kirkcudbright' and 'florist DG6' would drive consistent enquiries from couples planning weddings across the Stewartry.
